headline: How The Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And AI Demand
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings is back in focus after an updated fair value estimate lifted the modeled price target from US$297.09 to US$475.35 per share. Street research is actively reworking targets and ratings around Seagate, as firms refresh assumptions on revenue, margins, and valuation through 2026. As you read on, you will see how these shifts are shaping the current story around the stock and what to watch as the narrative evolves. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full...

headline: ‘S&P500 Outlook Points to Recovery’: Goldman Sachs Sees Headwinds Priced in and Suggests 2 Stocks to Buy
summary: War in the Middle East is weighing on markets, adding pressure through elevated oil prices and broader risk concerns. At the same time, the strong upward momentum seen earlier in the year has begun to moderate, leaving investors reassessing the path forward. The key question now is how markets will evolve in the near term and how portfolios should be positioned accordingly. Goldman Sachs strategist Ben Snider has been examining these dynamics and suggests that, while the headwinds are meaningful

headline: GeoWealth Extends Series C Round With $42.5 Million Strategic Investment From Goldman Sachs
summary: CHICAGO, March 19, 2026--GeoWealth, a proprietary technology and turnkey asset management platform (TAMP), today announced it has expanded its Series C financing to include a $42.5 million minority investment from Goldman Sachs to support its rapid momentum with an additional growth investment, while also providing liquidity to shareholders. headline: How The Story Around W. R. Berkley (WRB) Is Shifting On Valuation And Cycle Risks
summary: Price targets for W. R. Berkley have been adjusted in both directions, leaving the overall analyst stance slightly more cautious on where the shares should trade compared with earlier views. This reflects a mix of optimism around insurer profitability and sector earnings resilience on one side, as well as concern about softer pricing, potential estimate pressure for 2026 and 2027, and valuation versus peers on the other.
